description: Create a Python CI GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix strategy to test across multiple Python versions (3.8 to 3.12, including PyPy 3.9 and 3.10) and operating systems (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with Poetry, run tests with Pytest and coverage, perform type checks with mypy, and upload coverage results to Coveralls if applicable.
